title: Vanilla Imagined
description: New elegant way to view minecraft ui, and more.
body:
![Main Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/188xcccD/images/598614e534bf0fae701b93a5694159b8d5fc88e5.png)
<center>
  New way to view minecraft and enjoy it, with simplistic new menu and a lot of QoL futures like: better ore visibility and much more
</center>

## Futures
- Simplistic menu and GUI design
- Ore Outlines
- Blinking ender eyes
- Better nether portals*
- Connected glass*
- Connected Suspicious Blocks*
- Support for mods
- Brewing Guide
- and more

*Nether Portal and all connected texture blocks require [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to work.

## More Texture Packs
[![Cute_Creepers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c26912d9253033e6d8d5f1f22e5167359e3f6188.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cat-creeper)

## Addons
COMING SOON

## Compatible mods**
  - ~~[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)~~
  - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)  
  - ~~[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)~~
  - ~~[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)~~
  - [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)  
  - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)  
  - [Fast Trading]([https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-trading](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-trading))
  - ~~[Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)~~  
  - [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)  
  - [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem)

  _support for some mods will return in the future_
